mapper.sql: id , material_code, material_category_code, warehouse_id, logical_plant_id, logical_plant_no, logical_plant_type, location_id, location_no, batch_no, batch_time, batch_price, currency, unrestricted, damaged, inspection, uom, eta, due_date, warehouse_price, owner_id, create_time, creator_id, update_time, updator_id, deleted, tenant_id
mapper.insert:
insert into inventory_snapshot ( material_code, material_category_code, warehouse_id, logical_plant_id, logical_plant_no, logical_plant_type, location_id, location_no, batch_no, batch_time, batch_price, currency, unrestricted, damaged, inspection, uom, eta, due_date, warehouse_price, owner_id, create_time, creator_id, update_time, updator_id, deleted, tenant_id ) values
( #{item.materialCode}, #{item.materialCategoryCode}, #{item.warehouseId}, #{item.logicalPlantId}, #{item.logicalPlantNo}, #{item.logicalPlantType}, #{item.locationId}, #{item.locationNo}, #{item.batchNo}, #{item.batchTime}, #{item.batchPrice}, #{item.currency}, #{item.unrestricted}, #{item.damaged}, #{item.inspection}, #{item.uom}, #{item.eta}, #{item.dueDate}, #{item.warehousePrice}, #{item.ownerId}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.creatorId}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.updatorId}, #{item.deleted}, #{item.tenantId} )

INSERT INTO inventory_snapshot
material_code,
material_category_code,
warehouse_id,
logical_plant_id,
logical_plant_no,
logical_plant_type,
location_id,
location_no,
batch_no,
batch_time,
batch_price,
currency,
unrestricted,
damaged,
inspection,
uom,
eta,
due_date,
warehouse_price,
owner_id,
create_time,
creator_id,
update_time,
updator_id,
deleted,
tenant_id
#{materialCode},
#{materialCategoryCode},
#{warehouseId},
#{logicalPlantId},
#{logicalPlantNo},
#{logicalPlantType},
#{locationId},
#{locationNo},
#{batchNo},
#{batchTime},
#{batchPrice},
#{currency},
#{unrestricted},
#{damaged},
#{inspection},
#{uom},
#{eta},
#{dueDate},
#{warehousePrice},
#{ownerId},
#{createTime},
#{creatorId},
#{updateTime},
#{updatorId},
#{deleted},
#{tenantId}
mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM inventory_snapshot

SELECT t1.material_code,t1.material_category_code,t1.warehouse_id,t1.logical_plant_id,t1.logical_plant_no,t1.logical_plant_type,sum(t1.unrestricted) unrestricted, sum(t1.damaged) damaged, sum(t1.inspection) inspection, t1.uom, t1.batch_price, t1.tenant_id, t1.currency,t1.alert_id FROM giv.inventory_snapshot t1 WHERE t1.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND t1.deleted = 0
AND alert_id != 0
AND alert_id = 0
AND t1.logical_plant_id = #{logicalPlantId} AND t1.logical_plant_no = #{logicalPlantNo} AND t1.logical_plant_type = #{logicalPlantType} AND t1.material_code LIKE concat('%',concat('/', #{materialCode},'%')) ESCAPE '/'
AND t1.material_category_code LIKE concat('%',concat('/', #{materialCategoryCode},'%')) ESCAPE '/'
AND t1.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} GROUP BY t1.material_code,t1.logical_plant_id order by id desc

SELECT logical_plant_id, sum(unrestricted) unrestricted, sum(damaged) damaged, sum(inspection) inspection, sum(batch_price * unrestricted) batch_total_price, create_time FROM giv.inventory_snapshot WHERE material_code = #{materialCode} AND logical_plant_id = #{logicalPlantId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0 GROUP BY material_code, logical_plant_id

SELECT location_id, sum(unrestricted) unrestricted, sum(damaged) damaged, sum(inspection) inspection, sum(batch_price * unrestricted) batch_total_price, create_time FROM giv.inventory_snapshot WHERE material_code = #{materialCode} AND logical_plant_id = #{logicalPlantId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0 group by material_code, logical_plant_id, location_id

SELECT batch_no, batch_price, uom, currency, sum(unrestricted) unrestricted, sum(damaged) damaged, sum(inspection) inspection, sum(batch_price * unrestricted) batch_total_price, create_time, eta, due_date FROM giv.inventory_snapshot WHERE material_code = #{materialCode} AND logical_plant_id = #{logicalPlantId} AND location_id = #{locationId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0 group by material_code, logical_plant_id, location_id, batch_no
mapper.update:
update inventory_snapshot set alert_id = 0 where alert_id in
#{alert.id}
mapper.select:
select
from inventory_snapshot where batch_no in
#{batchNoList}
and deleted = 0
